events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 today – what's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV's First Video
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Fitting, really. What was your favourite music video of the 80s?

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's been 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Which track from their debut album still sounds absolutely massive to you?

events.title: Woodstock Festival (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock's Legacy
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people descended on a farm in New York for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. What's your favourite moment from Woodstock '69?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. His music continues to influence generations. What's your favourite Elvis song?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Rapper Tupac Shakur was shot on September 7, 1996, and died from his injuries on September 13, 1996, in Las Vegas. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the influential Tupac Shakur, who left us far too soon. His impact on music and culture is undeniable. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day. His guitar work changed everything. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles release Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: One of the most iconic album covers and tracklists turns 57 this month. What's your top pick from The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders anthem?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam G Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track featuring that iconic voice?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK in 1975. The album 'Imagine' was released on September 9, 1971 (US) and October 8, 1971 (UK).

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace and unity. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and it became available for purchase on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple gave us '1,000 songs in your pocket' with the first iPod. Did you have one of the originals, and what was on your playlist?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day marks the release of the very first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From Connery to Craig, who is your definitive Bond, and what's your favourite theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to resonate. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Comedy legend John Cleese, co-founder of Monty Python and star of Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles release 'White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, eclectic masterpiece. What are your standout tracks from this iconic double LP?
